title: Warm-up Poll: What’s Your Style
excerpt: Everyone has a different way of warming up during the 5-minute knock-up before a game. What’s your style before hitting the ball over to your opponent? Background reading: http://www.squashgame.info/ Official WSF Rules, section 4: http://www.worldsquash.org Results A few hits and then pass it over was the strong winner – good on ‘ya!
content:
Everyone has a different way of warming up during the 5-minute knock-up before a game. What’s your style before hitting the ball over to your opponent?

Background reading: http://www.squashgame.info/

Official WSF Rules, section 4: http://www.worldsquash.org

Results

A few hits and then pass it over was the strong winner – good on ‘ya!
